ddls:
CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "display_label" TEXT /* Display label for the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "is_readonly" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the class is read-only */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the class */,
  "ordinal" INTEGER /* Ordinal position of the class */,
  "base_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base class (for inheritance) */,
  "is_abstract" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the class is abstract */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the class is final */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the class is visible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "primitive_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each primitive type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the primitive type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the primitive type */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the type is custom */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enumerations" (
  "enumeration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enumeration type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the enumeration type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the enumeration type */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the enumeration is custom */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enumeration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enumeration was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enumeration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enumeration_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enumeration value */,
  "enumeration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enumeration type */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the enumeration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the enumeration value */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the value is custom */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enumeration_values_enumeration_id FOREIGN KEY ("enumeration_id") REFERENCES enumerations ("enumeration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "struct_classes" (
  "struct_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each struct class */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the struct class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the struct class */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the struct class is custom */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the struct class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the struct class was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("struct_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kind_of_quantities" (
  "kind_of_quantity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kind of quantity */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the kind of quantity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the kind of quantity */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the kind of quantity is custom */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the kind of quantity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the kind of quantity was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kind_of_quantity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category is custom */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_extensions" (
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property extension */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being extended */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the extension */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the extension */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the extension was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the extension was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_extensions" (
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class extension */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class being extended */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the extension */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the extension */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the extension was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the extension was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_extensions_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property relationship */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "related_property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related property */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship */,
  "navigation_direction" TEXT /* Navigation direction of the relationship */,
  "cardinality_min" INTEGER /* Minimum cardinality for the relationship */,
  "cardinality_max" INTEGER /* Maximum cardinality for the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class relationship */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "related_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related class */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship */,
  "navigation_direction" TEXT /* Navigation direction of the relationship */,
  "cardinality_min" INTEGER /* Minimum cardinality for the relationship */,
  "cardinality_max" INTEGER /* Maximum cardinality for the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_relationships_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_relationships_related_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)
